_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Gregtech New Horizons 2.8.X + Twist Space Technology
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH egg for versions 2.8.0+ (Java 17–25) with Twist Space Technology enabled.
Comes with an update script that handles GTNH updates and TST download during reinstall.
For TST, the maintained pairing in the upstream README is GTNH 2.8.4 + TST 0.7.+.
Set 'Update Twist Space Technology' to 1 only when updating TST so the required config/lang files are reset.
Make sure to back up before reinstalling!

More info:
https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Server_Setup#Server_Update

https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/downloads/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# GregTech New Horizons 2.8.X + Twist Space Technology Install Script
# Stable GTNH only. No daily build support.
# Uses temp install validation before replacing old pack files.
# 12.5.2026
# Now preserves ops, whitelist, both banned json and servertutil changes
# 21.5.2026
# removed serverutilities.cfg from the backup and restore system

set -euo pipefail
trap 'echo "ERROR: install failed on line $LINENO"; exit 1' ERR

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${TST_VERSION:=latest}"
: "${TST_UPDATE:=0}"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
WORK_DIR="$BASE_DIR/.gtnh-install-work"
EXTRACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/extracted"
BACKUP_DIR="$WORK_DIR/backup"

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

echo "Installing dependencies..."
apt update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y curl unzip ca-certificates rsync

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$EXTRACT_DIR" "$BACKUP_DIR"

validate_pack() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/java9args.txt" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing java9args.txt"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Pack validation OK."
}

download_stable_to_temp() {
  local zip_file="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"
  local url="https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks/${zip_file}"

  echo "Downloading stable GTNH ${GTVERSION}..."
  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" "$url"

  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

download_tst() {
  echo "Twist Space Technology support is always enabled in this egg."

  if [[ "$GTVERSION" != "2.8.4" ]]; then
    echo "WARNING: TST upstream README has listed GTNH 2.8.4 as the maintained/supported branch."
    echo "WARNING: You selected GTVERSION=$GTVERSION. Continuing anyway."
  fi

  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/mods"

  if [[ -z "$TST_VERSION" || "$TST_VERSION" == "latest" ]]; then
    echo "Resolving latest TST release tag..."
    TST_VERSION="$(curl -fsSLI -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' https://github.com/Nxer/Twist-Space-Technology-Mod/releases/latest | sed 's#.*/##')"
    if [[ -z "$TST_VERSION" ]]; then
      echo "ERROR: Failed to resolve latest TST release tag."
      exit 1
    fi
  fi

  local tst_jar="TwistSpaceTechnology-${TST_VERSION}.jar"
  local tst_url="https://github.com/Nxer/Twist-Space-Technology-Mod/releases/download/${TST_VERSION}/${tst_jar}"

  echo "Removing old TST jars..."
  find "$BASE_DIR/mods" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name 'TwistSpaceTechnology-*.jar' -o -name 'TwistSpaceTechnology *.jar' \) -delete

  echo "Downloading ${tst_jar}..."
  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    -o "$BASE_DIR/mods/$tst_jar" "$tst_url"

  if [[ "$TST_UPDATE" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "TST update mode enabled -> resetting GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg as recommended by the TST README..."
    rm -f "$BASE_DIR/GregTech.lang" "$BASE_DIR/config/GregTech.lang"
    rm -f "$BASE_DIR/config/TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg"
  else
    echo "TST update mode disabled -> keeping existing GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg"
  fi
}

download_stable_to_temp

if [[ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer..."
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

#this might break something in the future
echo "Backing up serverutil settings, ops, whitelist and banned players files..."

for path in \
  "ops.json" \
  "whitelist.json" \
  "banned-players.json" \
  "banned-ips.json" \
  "serverutilities/server/ranks.txt"
do
  if [[ -e "$BASE_DIR/$path" ]]; then
    echo "Preserving $path"
    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/$(dirname "$path")"
    cp -a "$BASE_DIR/$path" "$BACKUP_DIR/$path"
  fi
done

echo "Replacing old GTNH pack files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

rsync -a --no-perms \
  --exclude='.gtnh-install-work' \
  "$EXTRACT_DIR"/ "$BASE_DIR"/

if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found - skipping restore."
fi

#this might break something in the future
echo "Restoring serverutil settings, ops, whitelist and banned players files..."

for path in \
  "ops.json" \
  "whitelist.json" \
  "banned-players.json" \
  "banned-ips.json" \
  "serverutilities/server/ranks.txt"
do
  if [[ -e "$BACKUP_DIR/$path" ]]; then
    echo "Restoring $path"
    mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/$(dirname "$path")"
    cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/$path" "$BASE_DIR/$path"
  fi
done

download_tst

# This also prevents permission issues from downloaded zips.
echo "Fixing file and directory permissions..."
find "$BASE_DIR" -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
find "$BASE_DIR" -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;

rm -f "$BASE_DIR"/*.bat

if [[ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. 2.8.x and up supported

variables.name: Old memory env (deprecated)
variables.description: Legacy compatibility to prevent a crash only if installed using an earlier version of this egg. Update startup command manually in admin view if so: java -Xms128M -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=90.0 -Dfml.readTimeout=180 @java9args.txt -jar lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar nogui

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Twist Space Technology version
variables.description: Use a specific TST release tag such as 0.7.15, or 'latest' to resolve the newest release automatically.

variables.name: Update Twist Space Technology
variables.description: Set to 1 ONLY when updating TST. This resets GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg as required by the TST README. Set back to 0 after reinstall.
